waves.name: Foundation
waves.description: Bootstrap: Next.js 16 + Drizzle + tRPC + shadcn + env config

tasks.description: Initialize Next.js 16 with tRPC, Drizzle, Supabase auth, Tailwind 4, shadcn/ui new-york. Set up folder structure per CLAUDE.md.
Write all Drizzle schema files (users, profiles, documents, sponsorships, disbursements, certificates, partner_api_keys). One file per domain in src/db/schema/.
Wire tRPC context, root router, 6 stub routers (student/sponsor/university/admin/agent/partner), and server-side caller. Must typecheck clean.

waves.name: Auth + Layout + Copy
waves.description: Authentication flows, dashboard shell, role routing, all 6 copy configs

tasks.description: Build login, signup, password-reset, and email-confirm pages under src/app/(auth)/. Use Supabase SSR auth. Server-side redirect on session present.
Build role-parameterized dashboard layout at src/app/dashboard/[role]/layout.tsx. Nav per role from src/config/nav/. Mobile-first sidebar, dark mode, WCAG AA.
Write all 6 role copy config files (student.ts, sponsor.ts, university.ts, admin.ts, agent.ts, partner.ts) in src/config/copy/. All UI strings. No JSX-level hardcoding.

waves.name: Student Persona
waves.description: All 5 student pages wired end-to-end with tRPC + Drizzle

tasks.description: 4-step onboarding wizard: Welcome → Select School/Program → Funding Type → Action. Gate: students without completed onboarding redirect here. Server page + client wrapper.
KYC verification page: Dojah identity check + Mono bank account connect. Status tracker shows tier 1/2/3 progress. Server page + client wrapper.
Document upload page: upload to Supabase Storage via tRPC mutation. Document list with status badges (pending/approved/rejected). Rejection reason display.
Proof certificate page: progress checklist (KYC + bank + sponsor + documents). Certificate issued when all complete. Tamper-evident share link generation via tRPC.
Sponsor invitation page: invite by email (triggers Resend email). Pending/accepted/declined status tracker per invite. Cancel invite mutation.
Sponsor overview: EarningsPanel (total committed, disbursed, remaining), student portfolio list, pending invitations. Corporate + parent/guardian copy variants.
Individual student view for sponsor: progress timeline, document review status, KYC status, disbursement schedule with ControlToolbar actions (approve/reject/request-more).
Sponsor KYC page: identity verification (Dojah), bank account verification (Mono), affidavit signing. Corporate sub-type: CAC upload + compliance report download.
DisbursementFlow page: scheduled disbursements timeline, manual disburse mutation, disbursement history. Amount in kobo integers, display in ₦. Paystack integration.
Application pipeline: paginated list of students by status (pending/verified/enrolled/rejected). Bulk approve/reject actions. Export CSV via tRPC query.
Public certificate verification page at /certificate/[token]. No auth required. Shows: student name, school, program, funding amount, verification date, tamper-evident status.
Admin overview: platform metrics (active students, pending reviews, revenue), recent activity feed, system health indicators (Sentry, webhook delivery rate, DB latency).
Document review queue: paginated list with document viewer, approve/reject/request-more actions. Status transition triggers email notification via Resend.

waves.name: Agent + Partner Personas
waves.description: Agent portfolio management + partner API access

tasks.description: Agent overview: student portfolio list, commission tracker (pending/paid), commission rate per student, referral link generator. EarningsPanel variant for agents.
Partner overview: API usage metrics, active integrations, white-label config (brand colors, logo, domain). Revenue sharing breakdown.
API key management: generate/revoke keys, set scopes, view usage logs. REST API docs page (auto-generated from tRPC types). Rate limit display per key.

waves.name: Cross-Persona Wiring + Webhooks
waves.description: End-to-end cross-persona chains, email notifications, outbound webhooks

tasks.description: Wire: student invite → Resend email sent → sponsor sees invite in dashboard → sponsor accepts → student sponsorship status updates (realtime via Supabase subscription).
Wire: student uploads document → admin sees in queue → admin requests more info → Resend email to student → student re-uploads → admin re-reviews → approved/rejected.
Wire: student selects school → university sees in pipeline → university approves → student enrollment confirmed → proof certificate updated with enrollment status.
Build outbound webhook delivery system: Paystack, Mono, Dojah inbound handlers + idempotency via SHA-256 dedup. Email via Resend for all status transitions. /api/health endpoint.

waves.name: QA + Production
waves.description: E2E tests, Sentry wiring, Vercel deploy

tasks.description: Playwright smoke tests: auth flow (signup → login → redirect), student onboarding 4 steps, sponsor invite + accept chain, certificate public page loads. Seed data from tests/fixtures/.
Add Sentry.captureException to all API route handlers, tRPC middleware (error procedure), and cron handlers. No console.log. @sentry/nextjs configured per CLAUDE.md.
